priority_flags: ⚑ Displaced Student — May Need Housing/Social Support

agent3.summary: This student has not yet started their academic journey with approved units and has no grades yet, indicating a need for guidance and support.

interventions.action: Connect the student with an academic advisor to discuss course selection and academic planning.
Encourage the student to explore academic resources such as tutoring and study groups.
Provide information on financial aid options and scholarship opportunities.

agent3.message_to_student: Welcome to the university! We're here to support you in achieving your academic goals. Let's work together to build a successful academic journey for you.
